history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A cute anime girl with light blue, long, flowing hair, wearing a shark-themed hoodie with sharp teeth details on the hood and a small cat charm on her headphones. She has closed eyes and rosy cheeks, holding a video game controller in her hands. A smaller, similar anime character with headphones is visible in the background. The color palette is dominated by soft blues and whites, with sparkling accents. The background features stylized clouds and subtle water ripple effects, along with small icons of a fish in a speech bubble, a can of fish, and a ghost. The overall mood is cheerful and playful, with a touch of gaming enthusiasm. The text "Lacto Ai" is prominently displayed in a bubbly, light blue font at the bottom. The art style is chibi anime, with a focus on exaggerated cuteness and soft, dreamy lighting.
